mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_record (exchange, routing_key, message_body, message_type, retry_count, next_retry_time, status) VALUES (#{exchange}, #{routingKey}, #{messageBody}, #{messageType}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryTime}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE message_record SET exchange = #{exchange}, routing_key = #{routingKey}, message_body = #{messageBody}, message_type = #{messageType}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, status = #{status}, fail_reason = #{failReason}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, exchange, routing_key, message_body, message_type, retry_count, next_retry_time, status, fail_reason, create_time, update_time FROM message_record WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, exchange, routing_key, message_body, message_type, retry_count, next_retry_time, status, fail_reason, create_time, update_time FROM message_record WHERE status = #{status}

SELECT id, exchange, routing_key, message_body, message_type, retry_count, next_retry_time, status, fail_reason, create_time, update_time FROM message_record WHERE status = 3 AND next_retry_time <= #{now} AND retry_count < 5 ORDER BY next_retry_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE message_record SET status = #{status}, fail_reason = #{failReason}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE message_record SET retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE message_record SET message_body = #{messageBody}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
